response.justification: Candidate meets minimum requirements with 20 years of engineering experience and a BS in Computer Science, demonstrating strong technical execution across multiple domains. However, the role requires demonstrated AI/ML product expertise and director-level strategic leadership focused on AI—areas where this candidate shows significant gaps. Recent work with AI infrastructure at re:cinq is relevant but represents only 14 months in role, and the focus is tooling and frameworks rather than AI product strategy or customer advisory experience needed for this specialized position.
strengths: 20 years of engineering experience with consistent track record of shipping products across web, mobile, embedded systems, and infrastructure domains
Strong technical craftsmanship demonstrated through TDD discipline, CI/CD implementation, and teaching community through workshops and open-source contributions
Recent engagement with AI infrastructure and agentic workflows at re:cinq shows awareness of cutting-edge technologies and demonstrated ability to rapidly learn new domains
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML product development or AI strategy expertise prior to current role; AI experience is recent and infrastructure-focused rather than strategic or product-focused as role requires
Career progression shows strong individual technical execution but lacks evidence of director-level strategic advisory, customer-facing thought leadership, or organizational AI strategy impact

Limited cloud architecture strategy experience; cloud exposure appears at tool-implementation level (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) rather than platform strategy or infrastructure vision required for principal engineer role
